code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      let start = i
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(v)
            if is_ws(v)
              done = true
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = read_or_empty()
  let l2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_ints(l1)
  let b = parse_ints(l2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut x = 0
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      x = v
    when None
      x = 0
    end
    mut y = 0
    match b.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      y = v
    when None
      y = 0
    end
    let s = x + y
    print("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
end
